channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large branch hanging from tree wrotham rd welling, 12th March
item.description:
Large branch hanging from tree wrotham rd welling - outside St Michaels East Wickham School - branch could fall at any minute,. this is where the parents stand
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Wrotham Road, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Multiple Damage to Grass Verge, 12th March
item.description:
Significant number of grass verges damaged over winter due to cars driving over them. so if not all repeated as people access driveway later without sufficient drop kerb l

item.title: Abandoned bike, 12th March
item.description:
Bike with yellow handle bar grips has been abandoned for several months with thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Braganza Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road speed "Humps" sign pointing in the wrong direction, 12th March
item.description:
I have reported this before but I have just received an email response: "Following further investigations, we can confirm that the issue has already been resolved." Unfortunately the sign has not been touched and the sign is still pointing the wrong way. There is a road speed "Humps" sign on the corner of Wellington Avenue, Sherwood Park Avenue, Burnt Oak Lane and the Oval, Sidcup that is pointing in the wrong direction. It is currently pointing to The Oval (where there are no humps). It should be pointing to Sherwood Park Avenue where the speed humps are located.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red car parked permanently on main road causing obstruction, 12th March
item.description:
This car has been parked here on the main road for over a year. It causes an obstruction to the main road, for vehicles on the road itself and for those trying to turn out of St George’s road. There is not a clear view of traffic. It is parked opposite a bus stop which causes issues for traffic moving in both directions, because the road space is reduced when bus stops. It looks like there is a wheel clamp on it, and it is advertising a used car sale service. It is unsightly, and totally unhelpful for safer roads. Please look in to this as a matter of course.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sainsburys trolley blocking path outside 239 Mcleod Road, 12th March
item.description:
Dumped Sainsburys trolley blocking path outside 239 Mcleod Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mcleod Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass squares in Almond Close BR2 not cut like other verges, 12th March
item.description:
The square piece of grassland in Almond Way and all the grass verges have recently been cut in the last few days (photo 3) but the two squares of grass in Almond Close have been missed (photo 1, close view and photo 2, wide This has been happening quite frequently since Covid since it is tucked at the back. We pay quite a lot in Council tax. Please cut it like the other grass and grass verges. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Almond Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside St Michaels Church car park on the main road, 12th March
item.description:
There seems to be a blocked drain outside our Church. The water takes days to clear and the puddle takes over the road and pedestrian sidewalk. It is right outside our carpark, on the main road and foot path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Grove, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsecured, overflowing bins, 12th March
item.description:
The bins used by the flats at 18-24 Christchurch way are constantly overflowing with the lids left unsecured. This means large quantities of litter is constantly being blown from these onto the streets around Christchurch way and pelton road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellow lines opposite zigzags and school entrance, 12th March
item.description:
Parking on double yellow lines opposite zigzags and school entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coniston Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Vehicles for sale on the public road
